title: The EMC Open Target & Drug Atlas and a falsifiable multi-route treatment program for EWSR1::NR4A3 extraskeletal myxoid chondrosarcoma — a computation-only, provenance-checked resource
description: A reproducible, provenance-checked evidence system integrating every usable extraskeletal myxoid chondrosarcoma (EMC) dataset, patient-derived model, drug screen, and clinical cohort, with a transparent multi-component evidence score across all therapeutic routes (proteostasis-chromatin; fusion-subtype antiangiogenic biomarker; fusion-junction + lineage antigens; direct fusion targeting). Built from public data alone (no wet lab): reprocessed GEO expression, primary full-text-verified clinical evidence, DepMap dependency, FDA-label pharmacology, and fusion-junction MHC-I/II antigen prediction. Every claim carries a source locator and a verification level, and the resource records what did NOT survive verification. Includes a falsifiable, kill-criterion-per-route roadmap and a wet-lab-ready validation package. This Zenodo record is a citable snapshot of a living, one-command-reproducible repository.
